 * The following styles get applied both on the front of your site
 * and in the editor.

 */
@keyframes scroll-left {
  0% {
    transform: translateX(0%);
  }
  100% {
    transform: translateX(calc(-100% * var(--animation-scroll-translate-x)));
  }
}
@keyframes scroll-right {
  0% {
    transform: translateX(0%);
  }
  100% {
    transform: translateX(calc(100% * var(--animation-scroll-translate-x)));
  }
}
.wp-block-create-block-carrusel-hv {
  width: 100%;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.wp-block-create-block-carrusel-hv ul {
  overflow: hidden;
}

.wp-block-create-block-carrusel-hv ul.carrousel-hv-content.horizontal {
  display: flex;
  white-space: nowrap;
  clear: both;
  flex-direction: row;
}

.wp-block-create-block-carrusel-hv ul.carrousel-hv-content.horizontal li.item-carrousel-hv {
  padding: 0 16px;
  font-size: 15px;
  transform: translateX(100%);
  animation: scroll-left calc(5s * var(--animation-scroll-translate-x)) linear infinite;
}

.wp-block-create-block-carrusel-hv ul.carrousel-hv-content.horizontal:hover li.item-carrousel-hv {
  transform: translateX(0%);
  animation-play-state: paused;
}

.wp-block-create-block-carrusel-hv ul.carrousel-hv-content.horizontal[data-direction=false] {
  flex-direction: row-reverse;
}

.wp-block-create-block-carrusel-hv ul.carrousel-hv-content.horizontal li.item-carrousel-hv img.carrousel-hv-image {
  height: 50px;
  width: 250px;
  max-width: unset;
  -o-object-fit: contain;
     object-fit: contain;
  float: left;
  display: block;
  white-space: normal;
  margin: 1rem;
}

.wp-block-create-block-carrusel-hv ul.carrousel-hv-content.vertical {
  white-space: nowrap;
  clear: both;
  height: 750px;
  width: 200px;
  overflow-y: none;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}

    height: 550px;
    width: 150px;
  }
}

    align-items: center !important;
    padding: 0;
  }
}

    height: auto;
    width: 150px;
  }
}
.wp-block-create-block-carrusel-hv ul.carrousel-hv-content.vertical[data-direction=false] {
  flex-direction: column-reverse;
}

.wp-block-create-block-carrusel-hv ul.carrousel-hv-content.vertical li.item-carrousel-hv {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
}

  max-height: 150px;
  max-width: 150px;

div#carrusel-productos {
    overflow-x: scroll;
    flex-flow: nowrap;
    align-items: stretch;
    column-gap: 24px;
    padding-bottom: 24px;
}
div#carrusel-productos .wp-block-group.carrusel-productos-item {
    flex-shrink: 0;
    width: 360px;
    justify-content: space-between;

}
/* Scrollbar styles */
/* Firefox */
div#carrusel-productos {
  scrollbar-color: #00A35E transparent;
  scrollbar-width: thin;
}
/* Webkit and Blink*/
div#carrusel-productos::-webkit-scrollbar {
  width: 4px;
  background-color: transparent;
}
div#carrusel-productos::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
  background: #00A35E;
}
/* END Scrollbar Styles */

/** Carrusel-hv styles */
.wp-block-create-block-carrusel-hv {
max-width: unset;
}
.wp-block-create-block-carrusel-hv ul.carrousel-hv-content.horizontal {
    list-style-type: none;
    filter: grayscale(1);
}

/* End Carrusel-hv styles*/

  .wp-block-group.is-layout-grid.cuadricula-apilada-moviles {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(1, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }
}

/* Form WPCF7 Styles */
.wpcf7-form-control.wpcf7-text,
.wpcf7-form-control.wpcf7-email,
.wpcf7-form-control.wpcf7-textarea,
.wpcf7-form-control.wpcf7-submit,

    color: var(--wp--preset--color--accent-1);
	font-family: var(--wp--preset--font-family--manrope);
    font-size: var(--wp--preset--font-size--medium);
    margin: 16px 0;
}
.wpcf7-form-control.wpcf7-text,
.wpcf7-form-control.wpcf7-email,
.wpcf7-form-control.wpcf7-textarea,
.wpcf7-form-control.wpcf7-submit {
    border: none;
}

.wpcf7-form-control.wpcf7-textarea{
    background-color: var(--wp--preset--color--accent-2);
}

.wpcf7-form-control.wpcf7-select{    
    border: var(--wp--preset--color--accent-1) 1px solid;
    border-radius: 4px;
    background: #fff;
    padding: 1rem 2.25rem;
}

.wpcf7-form-control.wpcf7-text,
.wpcf7-form-control.wpcf7-email{
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--wp--preset--color--accent-4);
}

.wpcf7-form-control.wpcf7-submit{
    background-color: var(--wp--preset--color--accent-1);
    color: var(--wp--preset--color--base);
    padding: 1rem 2.25rem;
    border-radius: 4px;
}
.wp-block-contact-form-7-contact-form-selector .wpcf7-list-item {
	margin: 0;
}
.wp-block-navigation .wp-block-navigation-item.navigation-item-login{
    border: 1px solid var(--wp--preset--color--accent-1);
    border-radius: 4px;
    padding: 4px 8px !important;
    color: var(--wp--preset--color--base);
    background: var(--wp--preset--color--accent-1) !important;
    font-weight: normal;
}

li.wp-block-navigation-item.has-small-font-size.has-child.open-on-hover-click.wp-block-navigation-submenu .wp-block-navigation__submenu-container {
    width: fit-content;
    max-width: unset;
    min-width: unset;
}




:root :where(.wp-block-button .wp-block-button__link){background-color: var(--wp--preset--color--accent-1);border-radius: 4px;color: var(--wp--preset--color--base);}
:root :where(.wp-block-button .wp-block-button__link a:where(:not(.wp-element-button))){color: var(--wp--preset--color--base);}
:root :where(.wp-block-columns-is-layout-flow) > :first-child{margin-block-start: 0;}:root :where(.wp-block-columns-is-layout-flow) > :last-child{margin-block-end: 0;}:root :where(.wp-block-columns-is-layout-flow) > *{margin-block-start: var(--wp--preset--spacing--50);margin-block-end: 0;}:root :where(.wp-block-columns-is-layout-constrained) > :first-child{margin-block-start: 0;}:root :where(.wp-block-columns-is-layout-constrained) > :last-child{margin-block-end: 0;}:root :where(.wp-block-columns-is-layout-constrained) > *{margin-block-start: var(--wp--preset--spacing--50);margin-block-end: 0;}:root :where(.wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex){gap: var(--wp--preset--spacing--50);}:root :where(.wp-block-columns-is-layout-grid){gap: var(--wp--preset--spacing--50);}

:root :where(.wp-block-navigation){font-size: var(--wp--preset--font-size--medium);}
:root :where(.wp-block-navigation a:where(:not(.wp-element-button))){text-decoration: none;}

:root :where(.wp-block-group){font-family: var(--wp--preset--font-family--manrope);}
</style>

<div class="wp-block-group is-layout-flex wp-container-core-group-is-layout-7a92790e wp-block-group-is-layout-flex"><div class="wp-block-site-logo"><a href="https://digitalgreen.es/" class="custom-logo-link" rel="home" aria-current="page"><img width="80" height="80" src="https://digitalgreen.es/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/dg-logo-2025-80px.png" class="custom-logo" alt="Digital Green" decoding="async" /></a></div>


<div class="wp-block-group is-vertical is-layout-flex wp-container-core-group-is-layout-30a70405 wp-block-group-is-layout-flex">
<h1 class="wp-block-heading" id="page-title" style="text-transform:uppercase"><a href="https://digitalgreen.es/" data-type="page" data-id="143">digital <span class="has-accent-1-color has-text-color">green</span></a></h1>


<p class="wp-block-site-tagline has-small-font-size">High impact formats</p></div>
</div>

focusable="false"><path d="M1.50002 4L6.00002 8L10.5 4" stroke-width="1.5"></path></svg></button><ul data-wp-on-async--focus="actions.openMenuOnFocus" class="wp-block-navigation__submenu-container wp-block-navigation-submenu"><li class="has-small-font-size wp-block-navigation-item wp-block-navigation-link"><a class="wp-block-navigation-item__content"  href="https://digitalgreen.es/en/"><span class="wp-block-navigation-item__label">Inglés</span></a></li></ul></li></ul>
							</div>
						</div>
					</div>
				</div></nav></div>
</div>
</header>


<main class="wp-block-group has-global-padding is-layout-constrained wp-block-group-is-layout-constrained" style="margin-top:0">
<div class="wp-block-group alignfull has-global-padding is-layout-constrained wp-container-core-group-is-layout-0f9e5a71 wp-block-group-is-layout-constrained" style="margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0;padding-top:0;padding-right:var(--wp--preset--spacing--60);padding-bottom:0;padding-left:var(--wp--preset--spacing--60)"><div class="entry-content alignfull wp-block-post-content has-global-padding is-layout-constrained wp-block-post-content-is-layout-constrained">
<div class="wp-block-group alignfull has-accent-2-background-color has-background has-global-padding is-layout-constrained wp-block-group-is-layout-constrained" style="padding-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50);padding-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50)">
<div class="wp-block-columns alignwide are-vertically-aligned-center is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-6b535062 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex" style="padding-right:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);padding-left:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40)">
<div class="wp-block-column is-vertically-aligned-center is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading alignwide has-text-align-left has-custom-azul-videoo-tv-color has-text-color has-x-large-font-size" style="text-transform:none">Redefiniendo la publicidad digital. </h2>



<p class="has-text-align-left has-contrast-color has-text-color has-large-font-size"><em>Creadores de formatos de alto impacto que maximizan el ingreso publicitario.</em></p>



<div class="wp-block-buttons is-content-justification-left is-layout-flex wp-container-core-buttons-is-layout-ca7630a0 wp-block-buttons-is-layout-flex" style="margin-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--30);padding-top:0">
<div class="wp-block-button"><a class="wp-block-button__link wp-element-button" href="#contact">Contacta con nosotros</a></div>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-group is-nowrap is-layout-flex wp-container-core-group-is-layout-6c531013 wp-block-group-is-layout-flex">
<figure class="wp-block-image size-full is-resized"><a href="https://www.google.com/ads/publisher/partners/find-a-partner/#!?modal_active=modal-digital-green" target="_blank" rel=" noreferrer noopener"><img fetchpriority="high" decoding="async" width="768" height="289" src="https://digitalgreen.es/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/unnamed.png?_t=1757489905" alt="" class="wp-image-5394" style="width:250px" srcset="https://digitalgreen.es/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/unnamed.png 768w, https://digitalgreen.es/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/unnamed-300x113.png 300w" sizes="(max-width: 768px) 100vw, 768px" /></a></figure>

</div>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-vertically-aligned-center is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<figure class="wp-block-image aligncenter size-full"><img decoding="async" width="651" height="558" src="https://digitalgreen.es/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/imagenes-dg-verde_home-DG.png" alt="" class="wp-image-4821" srcset="https://digitalgreen.es/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/imagenes-dg-verde_home-DG.png 651w, https://digitalgreen.es/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/imagenes-dg-verde_home-DG-300x257.png 300w" sizes="(max-width: 651px) 100vw, 651px" /></figure>

<div class="wp-block-group alignwide is-vertical is-content-justification-center is-nowrap is-layout-flex wp-container-core-group-is-layout-76dd0bae wp-block-group-is-layout-flex" style="padding-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);padding-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40)">
<h4 class="wp-block-heading alignwide has-text-align-center has-custom-azul-videoo-tv-color has-text-color has-x-large-font-size" style="text-transform:none">Medios que ya trabajan con nosotros</h4>

<h4 class="wp-block-heading has-accent-1-color has-text-color has-link-color has-large-font-size wp-elements-b8493a399b4bc04754ee97ff3f7cd4d0">FIFA: First Impression Full Atenttion</h4>



<p style="font-size:clamp(14px, 0.875rem + ((1vw - 3.2px) * 0.196), 16px);">Formato tipo interstitial con mayor impacto.</p>

<h4 class="wp-block-heading has-accent-1-color has-text-color has-link-color has-large-font-size wp-elements-dd81b50fc859dba28d9652e5b54e0f27">InImage</h4>



<p style="font-size:clamp(14px, 0.875rem + ((1vw - 3.2px) * 0.196), 16px);">Monetiza tus imagenes con richmedia y display</p>



<div class="wp-block-buttons is-content-justification-center is-layout-flex wp-container-core-buttons-is-layout-a89b3969 wp-block-buttons-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-button has-custom-width wp-block-button__width-100 is-style-fill"><a class="wp-block-button__link wp-element-button" href="https://digitalgreen.es/landing/index.html?format=in-image" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener">Demo</a></div>
</div>

<div class="wp-block-group carrusel-productos-item has-border-color is-vertical is-content-justification-center is-layout-flex wp-container-core-group-is-layout-bc07c4df wp-block-group-is-layout-flex" style="border-color:#00a35e;border-width:1px;border-radius:16px;padding-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50);padding-right:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50);padding-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50);padding-left:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50)">

<h4 class="wp-block-heading has-accent-1-color has-text-color has-link-color has-large-font-size wp-elements-2feb6ef09446dc7018da1252803b2172">VideooNoticia</h4>



<p style="font-size:clamp(14px, 0.875rem + ((1vw - 3.2px) * 0.196), 16px);">Transforma tus artículos a audio, utilizando tu imagen principal y texto.</p>



<div class="wp-block-buttons is-content-justification-center is-layout-flex wp-container-core-buttons-is-layout-a89b3969 wp-block-buttons-is-layout-flex">

<div class="wp-block-group carrusel-productos-item has-border-color is-vertical is-content-justification-center is-layout-flex wp-container-core-group-is-layout-2a340299 wp-block-group-is-layout-flex" style="border-color:#00a35e;border-width:1px;border-radius:16px;padding-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50);padding-right:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50);padding-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50);padding-left:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50)">

<h4 class="wp-block-heading has-accent-1-color has-text-color has-link-color has-large-font-size wp-elements-168568be1a764a4184e53944e1f1029d">ContentWall</h4>



<p style="font-size:clamp(14px, 0.875rem + ((1vw - 3.2px) * 0.196), 16px);">Formato de recompensa de contenido para tus artículos.</p>



<div class="wp-block-buttons is-content-justification-center is-layout-flex wp-container-core-buttons-is-layout-a89b3969 wp-block-buttons-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-button is-style-fill"><a class="wp-block-button__link wp-element-button" href="https://digitalgreen.es/landing/index.html?format=videooWall" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener">Demo</a></div>
</div>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-group carrusel-productos-item has-border-color is-vertical is-content-justification-center is-layout-flex wp-container-core-group-is-layout-81393ddb wp-block-group-is-layout-flex" style="border-color:#00a35e;border-width:1px;border-radius:16px;padding-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50);padding-right:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50);padding-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50);padding-left:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50)">

<h4 class="wp-block-heading has-accent-1-color has-text-color has-link-color has-large-font-size wp-elements-471e2e16d710012383cf6d871a0d623a">ContentWall Plus</h4>



<p style="font-size:clamp(14px, 0.875rem + ((1vw - 3.2px) * 0.196), 16px);">Formato de recompensa que bloquea el texto a partir del segundo párrafo.</p>



<div class="wp-block-buttons is-layout-flex wp-block-buttons-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-button is-style-fill"><a class="wp-block-button__link wp-element-button" href="https://digitalgreen.es/landing/index.html?format=videooWall-plus" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener">Demo</a></div>

</div>



<div class="wp-block-group carrusel-productos-item has-border-color is-vertical is-content-justification-center is-layout-flex wp-container-core-group-is-layout-2a340299 wp-block-group-is-layout-flex" style="border-color:#00a35e;border-width:1px;border-radius:16px;padding-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50);padding-right:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50);padding-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50);padding-left:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50)">

<h4 class="wp-block-heading has-accent-1-color has-text-color has-link-color has-large-font-size wp-elements-5e93797e4662ae0eacc9f5a431c56966">VideooIntext</h4>



<p style="font-size:clamp(14px, 0.875rem + ((1vw - 3.2px) * 0.196), 16px);">Formato de recirculación de contenido con publicidad de vídeo y RichMedia.</p>

<h4 class="wp-block-heading has-accent-1-color has-text-color has-link-color has-large-font-size wp-elements-764cc753d100a11700b81407578c0540">Display</h4>



<p style="font-size:clamp(14px, 0.875rem + ((1vw - 3.2px) * 0.196), 16px);">Despreocupate de la optimización de display.</p>

</div>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-group carrusel-productos-item has-border-color is-vertical is-content-justification-center is-layout-flex wp-container-core-group-is-layout-81393ddb wp-block-group-is-layout-flex" style="border-color:#00a35e;border-width:1px;border-radius:16px;padding-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50);padding-right:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50);padding-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50);padding-left:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50)">
<figure class="wp-block-image size-full"><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="1000" height="1000" src="https://digitalgreen.es/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/imac-mockup-dg-youtube-overlay.png" alt="" class="wp-image-4948" srcset="https://digitalgreen.es/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/imac-mockup-dg-youtube-overlay.png 1000w, https://digitalgreen.es/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/imac-mockup-dg-youtube-overlay-300x300.png 300w, https://digitalgreen.es/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/imac-mockup-dg-youtube-overlay-150x150.png 150w, https://digitalgreen.es/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/imac-mockup-dg-youtube-overlay-768x768.png 768w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 1000px) 100vw, 1000px" /></figure>



<h4 class="wp-block-heading has-accent-1-color has-text-color has-link-color has-large-font-size wp-elements-6c8e807a2200be1ee12cfedb0449e54a">SocialWall</h4>



<p style="font-size:clamp(14px, 0.875rem + ((1vw - 3.2px) * 0.196), 16px);">Formato de recompensa de contenido social (vídeos de Youtube, Instagram y X).</p>



<div class="wp-block-buttons is-content-justification-center is-layout-flex wp-container-core-buttons-is-layout-a89b3969 wp-block-buttons-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-button is-style-fill"><a class="wp-block-button__link wp-element-button" href="https://digitalgreen.es/landing/index.html?format=socialWall" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener">Demo</a></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-group alignfull has-global-padding is-layout-constrained wp-block-group-is-layout-constrained" style="padding-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50);padding-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50)">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading alignwide has-text-align-center has-custom-azul-videoo-tv-color has-text-color has-xx-large-font-size" style="text-transform:none">Integración muy sencilla</h2>



<div class="wp-block-group alignwide cuadricula-apilada-moviles is-layout-grid wp-container-core-group-is-layout-09fd2ed9 wp-block-group-is-layout-grid" style="padding-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50);padding-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50)">
<div class="wp-block-group has-border-color is-vertical is-content-justification-center is-layout-flex wp-container-core-group-is-layout-db2364fe wp-block-group-is-layout-flex" style="border-color:#00a35e;border-width:1px;border-radius:16px;padding-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);padding-right:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);padding-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);padding-left:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40)">
<figure class="wp-block-image alignleft size-full"><img decoding="async" src="https://digitalgreen.es/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/icono-contacta.png" alt="" class="wp-image-4843"/></figure>



<h4 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center has-accent-1-color has-text-color has-link-color has-large-font-size wp-elements-d10ea8588288f5b33267fa7bdce1dc6b" style="font-style:italic;font-weight:900">Contacta <br>con nosotros</h4>



<p class="has-text-align-center has-medium-font-size">Llamando al <a href="tel:34623040950">+34 623 040 950</a><br><a href="https://calendly.com/daniel-videootv">Reservando una llamada</a><br>Contactando por <a href="https://api.whatsapp.com/send?phone=34623040950">WhatsApp</a></p>

<div class="wp-block-group has-border-color is-vertical is-content-justification-center is-layout-flex wp-container-core-group-is-layout-db2364fe wp-block-group-is-layout-flex" style="border-color:#00a35e;border-width:1px;border-radius:16px;padding-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);padding-right:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);padding-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);padding-left:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40)">

<h4 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center has-accent-1-color has-text-color has-link-color has-large-font-size wp-elements-a35ffa24e9c3c5f432d8ed7f542cf5b3" style="font-style:italic;font-weight:900">Implementa <br>en tu web</h4>



<p class="has-text-align-center has-medium-font-size">Con el archivo JS que te enviaremos y actualizando el fichero ads.txt.</p>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-group has-border-color is-vertical is-content-justification-center is-layout-flex wp-container-core-group-is-layout-db2364fe wp-block-group-is-layout-flex" style="border-color:#00a35e;border-width:1px;border-radius:16px;padding-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);padding-right:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);padding-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);padding-left:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40)">

<h4 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center has-accent-1-color has-text-color has-link-color has-large-font-size wp-elements-7b16ef6c4e39d75432e648e00db93ca2" style="font-style:italic;font-weight:900">Monitoriza <br>los resultados</h4>



<p class="has-text-align-center has-medium-font-size">Accede a tu zona privada, haz un seguimiento de tus ingresos y<br>visualiza tus estadísticas.</p>

<h2 class="wp-block-heading">Ponte en contacto con nosotros</h2>

--wpforms-button-size-margin-top: 10px;

			}
			</style><div class="wpforms-container wpforms-container-full wpforms-block wpforms-block-ea985b28-c3d8-48b9-936e-ba651abfafd4 wpforms-render-modern" id="wpforms-5299"><form id="wpforms-form-5299" class="wpforms-validate wpforms-form wpforms-ajax-form" data-formid="5299" method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data" action="/?ref=videootv" data-token="f0c18ba8531d4f7bef8eaa3313c78449" data-token-time="1771937309"><noscript class="wpforms-error-noscript">Please enable JavaScript in your browser to complete this form.</noscript><div class="wpforms-hidden" id="wpforms-error-noscript">Please enable JavaScript in your browser to complete this form.</div><div class="wpforms-field-container"><div id="wpforms-5299-field_1-container" class="wpforms-field wpforms-field-name" data-field-id="1"><label class="wpforms-field-label" for="wpforms-5299-field_1">Nombre <span class="wpforms-required-label" aria-hidden="true">*</span></label><input type="text" id="wpforms-5299-field_1" class="wpforms-field-medium wpforms-field-required" name="wpforms[fields][1]" aria-errormessage="wpforms-5299-field_1-error" required></div>		<div id="wpforms-5299-field_5-container"
			class="wpforms-field wpforms-field-text"
			data-field-type="text"
			data-field-id="5"
			>
			<label class="wpforms-field-label" for="wpforms-5299-field_5" >Mensaje Email Dropdown</label>
			<input type="text" id="wpforms-5299-field_5" class="wpforms-field-medium" name="wpforms[fields][5]" >
		</div>
		<div id="wpforms-5299-field_2-container" class="wpforms-field wpforms-field-number" data-field-id="2"><label class="wpforms-field-label" for="wpforms-5299-field_2">Teléfono</label><input type="number" id="wpforms-5299-field_2" class="wpforms-field-medium" name="wpforms[fields][2]" step="any" aria-errormessage="wpforms-5299-field_2-error" ></div><div id="wpforms-5299-field_3-container" class="wpforms-field wpforms-field-email" data-field-id="3"><label class="wpforms-field-label" for="wpforms-5299-field_3">Email <span class="wpforms-required-label" 				( function() {
					const style = document.createElement( 'style' );
					style.appendChild( document.createTextNode( '#wpforms-5299-field_5-container { position: absolute !important; overflow: hidden !important; display: inline !important; height: 1px !important; width: 1px !important; z-index: -1000 !important; padding: 0 !important; } #wpforms-5299-field_5-container input { visibility: hidden; } #wpforms-conversational-form-page #wpforms-5299-field_5-container label { counter-increment: none; }' ) );

					document.currentScript?.remove();
				} )();
			</script></div><!-- .wpforms-field-container --><div class="wpforms-recaptcha-container wpforms-is-recaptcha wpforms-is-recaptcha-type-v3" ><input type="hidden" name="wpforms[recaptcha]" value=""></div><div class="wpforms-submit-container" ><input type="hidden" name="wpforms[id]" value="5299"><input type="hidden" name="page_title" value="Digital Green &#8211; Formatos de alto impacto"><input type="hidden" name="page_url" value="https://digitalgreen.es/?ref=videootv"><input type="hidden" name="url_referer" value="https://videoo.tv/app-ads.txt"><input type="hidden" name="page_id" value="143"><input type="hidden" name="wpforms[post_id]" value="143"><button type="submit" name="wpforms[submit]" id="wpforms-submit-5299" class="wpforms-submit" data-alt-text="Enviando..." data-submit-text="Enviar" aria-live="assertive" value="wpforms-submit">Enviar</button><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" src="https://digitalgreen.es/wp-content/plugins/wpforms-lite/assets/images/submit-spin.svg" class="wpforms-submit-spinner" style="display: none;" width="26" height="26" alt="Loading"></div></form></div>  <!-- .wpforms-container --></div>

<aside id="from-videootv-modal" class="modal">
			<div class="modal-content">
				<span class="close">&times;</span>
				<h2>Nos unimos para avanzar juntos</h2>
				<p>VideooTV y Digital Green ahora son una sola marca: <strong>Digital Green.</strong></p>
				<p>Esta unión nos permite ofrecerte una experiencia más innovadora, sostenible y conectada, bajo una identidad unificada.</p>
				<p>Mismo equipo, misma pasión. Nueva etapa.</p>
				<img src="https://digitalgreen.es/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/videootv-to-dg-logos.png" alt="VideooTv ahora es Digital Green">
			</div>
		</aside><link rel='stylesheet' id='wpforms-modern-full-css' href='https://digitalgreen.es/wp-content/plugins/wpforms-lite/assets/css/frontend/modern/wpforms-full.min.css?ver=1.9.6.1' media='all' />

<script id="wp-block-template-skip-link-js-after">
	( function() {
		var skipLinkTarget = document.querySelector( 'main' ),
			sibling,
			skipLinkTargetID,
			skipLink;

		// Early exit if a skip-link target can't be located.
		if ( ! skipLinkTarget ) {
			return;
		}

		/*
		 * Get the site wrapper.
		 * The skip-link will be injected in the beginning of it.
		 */
		sibling = document.querySelector( '.wp-site-blocks' );

		// Early exit if the root element was not found.
		if ( ! sibling ) {
			return;
		}

		// Get the skip-link target's ID, and generate one if it doesn't exist.
		skipLinkTargetID = skipLinkTarget.id;
		if ( ! skipLinkTargetID ) {
			skipLinkTargetID = 'wp--skip-link--target';
			skipLinkTarget.id = skipLinkTargetID;
		}

		// Create the skip link.
		skipLink = document.createElement( 'a' );
		skipLink.classList.add( 'skip-link', 'screen-reader-text' );
		skipLink.id = 'wp-skip-link';
		skipLink.href = '#' + skipLinkTargetID;
		skipLink.innerText = 'Saltar al contenido';

		// Inject the skip link.
		sibling.parentElement.insertBefore( skipLink, sibling );
	}() );
	
</script>
<script src="https://digitalgreen.es/wp-includes/js/dist/hooks.min.js?ver=4d63a3d491d11ffd8ac6" id="wp-hooks-js"></script>
<script src="https://digitalgreen.es/wp-includes/js/dist/i18n.min.js?ver=5e580eb46a90c2b997e6" id="wp-i18n-js"></script>
<script id="wp-i18n-js-after">
wp.i18n.setLocaleData( { 'text direction\u0004ltr': [ 'ltr' ] } );
</script>
<script src="https://digitalgreen.es/wp-includes/js/dist/vendor/wp-polyfill.min.js?ver=3.15.0" id="wp-polyfill-js"></script>

	wp.i18n.setLocaleData( localeData, domain );

<script id="wpforms-recaptcha-js-after">
var wpformsDispatchEvent = function (el, ev, custom) {
				var e = document.createEvent(custom ? "CustomEvent" : "HTMLEvents");
				custom ? e.initCustomEvent(ev, true, true, false) : e.initEvent(ev, true, true);
				el.dispatchEvent(e);
			};
		var wpformsRecaptchaV3Execute = function ( callback ) {
					grecaptcha.execute( "6LdkCG0rAAAAABPR9Xv59EZEStr18QG0QJpfRS1t", { action: "wpforms" } ).then( function ( token ) {
						Array.prototype.forEach.call( document.getElementsByName( "wpforms[recaptcha]" ), function ( el ) {
							el.value = token;
						} );
						if ( typeof callback === "function" ) {
							return callback();
						}
					} );
				}
				grecaptcha.ready( function () {
					wpformsDispatchEvent( document, "wpformsRecaptchaLoaded", true );
				} );
			
</script>
